reasoning: Zootopia 2 faces intense competition in 2025 for the top opening weekend spot, particularly from tentpole films like Jurassic World Rebirth, Superman, and Avatar: Fire and Ash. Thanksgiving releases often rely on long legs rather than record-breaking 3-day opening weekend totals (which are compressed by the Wednesday openings characteristic of the holiday). The market price of 7% correctly reflects that while it will likely be a very successful box office performer, it is an obvious underdog for the absolute 'highest 3-day opening weekend of the entire year'.
